name: Hershey Bar Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Buttermilk OR 1 cup Milk + 1 Tb Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the syrup, melted Hershey bars, and vanilla extract.
2. Cream the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs to the milk mixture one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually combine the flour and baking soda with 1/3 of the buttermilk (or milk + vinegar) mixture until just combined.
5. Fold in the remaining ingredients until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into a greased angel food cake pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1-1/2 hours, or until set and golden brown.
